text:
On Thu, Apr 12, 2007 at 07:40:09PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/scapy,
>

>

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111518

Just tried it, it's ok for me.
